titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Associate University Librarian for Technical Services, Yale University, Records
Associate University Librarian for Technical Services, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday March 21, 2020 at 10:40
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Associate University Librarian for Technical Services, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of files of Ake Koel, F. Bernice Field, and Donald Waters, including reports and records concerning NELINET, RLG, OCLC, AACR2, library automation, preservation, reclassification, ARL Task Force, catalog continuation, ALA conferences, catalog code revision, union negotiations, and salaries. The records document technical services at the Yale University Library.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 32-B (YRG 32-B), Records of deputy, associate, and assistant librarians of Yale University.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Associate University Librarian for Technical Services, Yale University, Records (RU 215). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of files of Ake Koel, F. Bernice Field, and Donald Waters, including reports and records concerning NELINET, RLG, OCLC, AACR2, library automation, preservation, reclassification, ARL Task Force, catalog continuation, ALA conferences, catalog code revision, union negotiations, and salaries. The records document technical services at the Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Original born digital files, as well as preservation masters, may not be accessed due to their fragility. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist request that they be made. Born digital files cannot be accessed remotely. System requirements include a Manuscripts and Archives computer and file viewing software.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: As a preservation measure, original materials may not be used. Digital access copies must be provided for use. Contact Manuscripts and Archives at mssa.assist@yale.edu to request access
